message:
feat(frankenpandas): re-export rusqlite under sql-sqlite feature (br-r34z9 / fd90.130)

fd90.130: README Quick Start at line 231 calls
  let conn = rusqlite::Connection::open_in_memory()?;

But rusqlite is only a feature-gated transitive dep of frankenpandas
(via fp-io's sql-sqlite). A user copy-pasting the example would hit:
  error[E0433]: failed to resolve: use of undeclared crate or module 'rusqlite'

unless they manually add rusqlite to their own Cargo.toml — Rust 2024
edition doesn't pollute the user's namespace with transitive deps.

Fix:
1. Add 'rusqlite = { workspace = true, optional = true }' to
   frankenpandas's Cargo.toml.
2. Wire 'dep:rusqlite' into the existing sql-sqlite feature flag so
   the same default-on guarantee applies.
3. Re-export with '#[cfg(feature = \"sql-sqlite\")] pub use rusqlite;'
   so users access it via 'frankenpandas::rusqlite::...'.
4. Update Quick Start to use 'frankenpandas::rusqlite::Connection' so
   the example is genuinely runnable from a single dep.
5. Add a regression test 'rusqlite_reexport_quickstart_compiles' that
   actually constructs a connection through the re-export.

Verified:
- cargo build -p frankenpandas — compiles
- cargo test -p frankenpandas --lib — 6 tests pass (5 prelude + 1 new)

The optional-dep pattern means callers who disable sql-sqlite still
don't pull in rusqlite, matching fp-io's existing gating.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,6 +22,11 @@ fp-join = { path = "../fp-join" }
 fp-runtime = { path = "../fp-runtime" }
 fp-types = { path = "../fp-types" }
 
+# Re-exported under the sql-sqlite feature so README Quick Start can call
+# rusqlite::Connection::open_in_memory()? without users adding rusqlite as
+# a direct dep. Matches fp-io's optional gating (br-frankenpandas-r34z9 / fd90.130).
+rusqlite = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+
 # Per br-frankenpandas-l6nr (fd90.58) and br-frankenpandas-ii9u
 # (fd90.59): forward inner-crate feature flags so umbrella users
 # can opt in/out without depending on inner crates directly.
@@ -37,7 +42,7 @@ fp-types = { path = "../fp-types" }
 #   integration. Off by default.
 [features]
 default = ["sql-sqlite"]
-sql-sqlite = ["fp-io/sql-sqlite"]
+sql-sqlite = ["fp-io/sql-sqlite", "dep:rusqlite"]
 sql-postgresql = ["fp-io/sql-postgresql"]
 sql-mysql = ["fp-io/sql-mysql"]
 tracing = ["fp-frame/tracing"]
